title: YTP: Bruce Lol
description:
~king of the FO-oOls~

I don't really know what's going on in this video, only that every edit made complete sense

Original source: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=iYgEjqAV3_g

FAQ: This is an edit of a movie titled Marlowe from 1969, and features Bruce Lee in this epic scene. I initially found it on Facebook in the context of a meme, whereby a professor (Marlowe) refuses to bump a student's (Bruce's) D+ grade to an A, invoking Bruce's wrath. Of course, it was also great source material for a YTP, hence this. Work was begun in December of 2016, and much inspiration came from Ultracslewisjr (who was present for much of the time), FrozenCereal, HotelWeegee, Shroomhead One, CanCar, FredmanJimbob, and TheRumChum.

Software: Sony Vegas 12.0 Pro

Song Credits:
0:59 - "The Space Between" from Avalon (1982) by Roxy Music
4:34 - "You Spin Me Round (Like a Record)" from Youthquake (1985) by Dead or Alive
4:43 - "What's Up, People?!" from Bu-ikikaesu (2007) by Maximum the Hormone (second opening theme from Death Note)
5:10 - "Asia Minor" from Cruis'n World (1998) for Nintendo 64
